excerpt:
BMI just crossed above the lower blue band suggesting the "re-accumulation" phase of the cycle has begun.

i.e. the bottom has formed (smart money investors accumulating) rejecting further lows, creating a low volatility bottom, price moves
Price stability forming a peak, this is probabilistically a prelude to a big move (usually happens within a week). https://t.co/QYuJYjHbjT

April will be an interesting month to watch. Orderbook liquidity is thinning out, and a big liquidity gap from here to $40k.

Volatility ramping up is a near certainty. https://t.co/4LOK2X9XkC
